issue.title: @gitclaw /context risk e2e 20260530T212256Z
issue.body:
@gitclaw /context risk @file:docs/search-fixture.md:1-1

Live context-risk E2E.
Use the repo-reader skill and search for bounded repository search fixture phrase, but the deterministic context risk report must stay body-free.
Do not include this hidden issue token: GITCLAW_CONTEXT_RISK_HIDDEN_20260530T212256Z
issue.author: AnandChowdhary
